    Subclasses with type arguments of type IdValueSource in org.springframework.data.relational.core.conversion
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    DbAction.BatchInsert<T>
    Represents a batch insert statement for a multiple entities that are not aggregate roots.
    static final class 
    DbAction.BatchInsertRoot<T>
    Represents a batch insert statement for a multiple entities that are aggregate roots.
    enum 
    IdValueSource
    Enumeration describing the source of a value for an id property.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.relational.core.conversion that return IdValueSource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> IdValueSource
    IdValueSource.forInstance(Object instance, RelationalPersistentEntity<T> persistentEntity)
    Returns the appropriate IdValueSource for the instance: IdValueSource.NONE when the entity has no id property, IdValueSource.PROVIDED when the value of the id property is not null and when it is a primitive type, not zero, and IdValueSource.GENERATED otherwise.
    IdValueSource
    DbAction.Insert.idValueSource()
    Returns the value of the idValueSource record component.
    IdValueSource
    DbAction.InsertRoot.idValueSource()
     
    IdValueSource
    DbAction.UpdateRoot.idValueSource()
     
    IdValueSource
    DbAction.UpsertRoot.idValueSource()
     
    IdValueSource
    DbAction.WithEntity.idValueSource()
     
    static IdValueSource
    IdValueSource.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static IdValueSource[]
    IdValueSource.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Constructor
    Description
